user.title: Sber Smart Home MQTT Bridge

data_description.sber_verify_ssl: Disable only if broker uses a custom or self-signed CA certificate

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Sber MQTT broker

abort.already_configured: This Sber account is already configured

init.title: Sber Bridge Settings
init.description:
{entity_summary}

---

Use the **Sber Bridge** panel in the sidebar for full device management (recommended).

Choose 'Advanced' below only if you need fallback entity management.

data.action: What would you like to do?

entity_preview.title: Entity Type Preview
entity_preview.description:
{preview}

Entities marked with ✏️ have a manual type override.

data_description.exposed_entities: Select which Home Assistant entities to make available in Sber Smart Home

select_domains.title: Select by Domain
select_domains.description: Select domains to add all their entities to Sber. Existing selections will be preserved.

select_labels.title: Select by Label
select_labels.description: Select labels to add all entities with those labels to Sber. Existing selections will be preserved.

type_overrides.title: Entity Type Overrides
type_overrides.description: Override the Sber device type for each exposed entity. 'Auto' uses automatic detection based on HA domain and device class.

entity_not_found.title: Entity not found
entity_not_found.description: Entity `{entity_id}` is in the exposed list but was not found in the entity registry. Remove it from the exposed list or check that the entity exists.

entities_without_state.title: Entities without state
entities_without_state.description: {count} entities have no state yet: {entities}. They may not have been initialized or are unavailable.

connection_issues.title: MQTT connection issues
connection_issues.description: Connection to Sber MQTT broker has been lost. Reconnect attempts: {reconnect_count}. Check your credentials and network connectivity.
